description: A customer calls because their gas bill doubled in the winter and they want to understand why.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the customer's gas usage history and compare it with the heating degree days (HDD) for the billing period.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms that usage increased, and it correlates with a much colder than average month.

nodes.task_description: Explain the relationship between colder weather and higher heating usage.

expected_outcome.value: Agent clearly communicates why the bill was higher.

nodes.task_description: Offer the customer information on energy conservation tips and the budget billing program to help manage seasonal bill swings.

expected_outcome.value: Agent provides helpful information on savings and bill management programs.
